steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__ && window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.replaceSemanticValidationBehaviors && window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.replaceSemanticValidationBehaviors([{ match: { modelRef: 'model://steward/performance/ad_delivery@v1', entity: 'line_delivery', dimensions: ['event_date', 'channel', 'age_group'], measures: ['available_impressions', 'household_uniques'] }, delayMs: 1500 }]);

steps.text: Validating the semantic selection against the provider.
Audience Age Group is not supported for this semantic selection in the demo provider.
Household Uniques cannot be combined with Audience Age Group in this demo semantic provider.

steps.expression: (() => { const text = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; const runButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).filter((button) => (button.innerText || '').trim() === 'Run'); return !text.includes('Validating the semantic selection against the provider.') && runButtons.length === 1 && runButtons[0].disabled === false; })()
